name: Hacker News
description: Listen to Hacker News posts and comment threads without reading every word on screen.
metaDescription: Read Hacker News threads aloud with Voq — free text-to-speech Chrome extension. Great for long comment sections.
steps: Install Voq from the Chrome Web Store for free.
Open news.ycombinator.com and navigate to a story or comment thread.
Select the text from the post or comments you want to hear.
Click the Voq icon in your Chrome toolbar, or right-click and pick 'Read with Voq'.
Voq reads the selected text aloud with its reading panel.
Pause or resume at any time, or adjust the voice speed to your preference.
